code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut sum = 0
mut state = 0
mut num = 0
mut neg = false
mut have_num = false

while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
  else
    10
  end

  if b == 10 or b == 13
    if have_num
      if neg
        sum = sum - num
      else
        sum = sum + num
      end
    end
    state = 0
    num = 0
    neg = false
    have_num = false
  else if state == 0
    if b == 32 or b == 9
      state = 0
    else
      state = 1
    end
  else if state == 1
    if b == 32 or b == 9
      state = 2
    else
      state = 1
    end
  else if state == 2
    if b == 32 or b == 9
      state = 2
    else
      state = 3
      have_num = true
      if b == 45
        neg = true
      else if b == 43
        neg = false
      else
        num = b - 48
      end
    end
  else if state == 3
    if b == 32 or b == 9
      state = 4
    else
      num = num * 10 + (b - 48)
    end
  else
    state = 4
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println("sum=#{sum}")
